releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

### Organize Note: Toggle Restore for Tag/Link Chips

- **× now toggles instead of deleting**: Clicking × on a suggested tag or link disables it (greyed out with ↺ icon) instead of permanently removing it.
- **↺ restores**: Click ↺ to re-enable a disabled chip. No need to re-type or re-run AI.
- **Apply All respects toggles**: Only enabled (non-greyed) items are applied.
- Matches the existing toggle pattern in Batch Preview for full UI consistency.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dhwang0803-glitch/Vaultend/compare/1.0.8...1.0.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

### Organize UI Consistency Improvements

- **Undo for Organize Note**: Apply All now shows a Notice toast with an Undo button (auto-dismisses after 10s). Changes are recorded in Activity Log for later restore.
- **Manual tag/link input**: All Organize features (Note, Folder, Batch Preview) now consistently support adding custom tags and links.
- **Always-visible input rows**: Tag/link input fields appear even when AI returns no suggestions, so you can always manually add items.
- **Rollback safety**: If history recording fails after applying changes, the note is automatically restored to its previous state.

### Fixes (Codex cross-verify)

- Fixed: Organize Folder didn't render tag/link sections when AI returned no suggestions
- Fixed: OrganizeResultModal didn't rollback changes when history recording failed

### Quality

- ESLint (incl. eslint-plugin-obsidianmd): PASS
- TypeScript: PASS
- Tests: 599/599 passed

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dhwang0803-glitch/Vaultend/compare/1.0.7...1.0.8

releases.author: dhwang0803-glitch
releases.description:
## Changes

- **Organize Folder batch cap**: Processes at most 50 notes per run with a "Continue" button to resume with the next batch. Prevents overwhelming API costs, time, and rate limits on large vaults.
- **README fixes**: "Gemini embeddings" → "embeddings" (multi-provider support), tag batch size corrected from 500 to 200.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Breaking Changes
- **DeepSeek provider removed**: DeepSeek does not support an embedding API, causing silent failures in tag similarity, cross-language tag resolution, and link suggestions. Users needing DeepSeek can use the **Custom (OpenAI-compatible)** provider option, but embedding-based features will not work.

### Bug Fixes
- **Embedding safety guards**: Fixed potential `undefined` values being stored in embedding caches when a provider returns empty embeddings. Added early return and null checks in OrganizeNoteUseCase, RunInboxProcessUseCase, and RunMaintenanceUseCase.

### Improvements
- **Unified model dropdown**: All providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama) now use a dropdown with pre-defined models + Custom option. Previously Ollama and DeepSeek used plain text input.
- **README updated**: Added provider embedding support table, Ollama model list, and DeepSeek removal note.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dhwang0803-glitch/Vaultend/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Bug Fixes
- **Complete i18n history log**: All maintenance action types (delete, archive, tag-merge, tag-add, link-remove, link-add, dismiss, classify, restore) now display in the user's selected language with backward compatibility for old Korean entries
- **Fix dismiss empty brackets**: Dismiss entries no longer show `[]` when issueType metadata is missing
- **Fix duplicate tag merge sync**: Organize Tags and Run Maintenance views now properly sync — merging tags in one view marks them as applied in the other

### Improvements
- **README GIF screenshots**: Added 6 animated GIF demonstrations for all major features (hero, organize-note, organize-folder, organize-tags, run-maintenance, activity-log)

### Version
- Bumped from 0.9.5 to 1.0.1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dhwang0803-glitch/Vaultend/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: dhwang0803-glitch
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### Bug Fixes
- **Tag merge YAML quote parsing**: `extractFrontmatterTags` now correctly strips quotes in YAML list format (`- "#tag"`), fixing tag merge failures for tags like `#react`/`#reactjs`
- **tagsOnly mode threading**: Organize Selected from Untagged/Missing Tags no longer shows link suggestion UI
- **Link similarity threshold**: Default lowered from 0.55 to 0.40, slider range expanded to 0.30-0.80

### Features
- **Real-time progress tracking**: Organize batch processing now shows 1/N, 2/N...N/N instead of staying at 0/N
- **Tag format rules**: Added tag format rules to classification prompt; Organize Selected button activated

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dhwang0803-glitch/Vaultend/compare/0.9.4...0.9.5

releases.description:
## v0.4.9 — Restore UX 개선 + Archive 복원 + Organize Folder

### Fixed
- **취소선 범위 수정**: 복원 버튼에 취소선이 걸리지 않도록 텍스트에만 적용
- **복원 버튼 빨간색 복원**: `.setWarning()` 시각적 구분 강화
- **Archive 복원 구현**: 아카이브된 노트를 원래 위치로 되돌리기 지원
- **Dismiss 복구 지원**: 실수로 dismiss한 항목을 복원 버튼으로 되돌리기 가능
- **Vault root 폴더 정규화**: Organize Folder에서 전체 vault 대상 처리 가능 (Codex P2)

### Changed
- **Process Inbox → Organize Folder**: 커맨드 팔레트에서 폴더 선택 모달로 어떤 폴더든 AI 배치 정리 가능. 폴더 우클릭 컨텍스트 메뉴 지원.

### Removed
- **Create Note 버튼 제거**: 깨진 링크 섹션에서 빈 노트 생성 버튼 제거
releases.name: v0.4.9

releases.author: dhwang0803-glitch
releases.description:
## v0.4.8 — Restore UX 수정 + Auto Maintenance 경합 방지

### Fixed
- **Restore 후 Applied 상태 유실**: 개별/배치 복원 후 re-render 시 Applied 상태가 초기화되던 버그 수정 (`appliedEntries` Map 도입)
- **Restore 버튼 스타일 개선**: `.setWarning()` 빨간 경고 스타일 제거
- **Auto Maintenance가 Restore 덮어쓰기 방지**: `restoreInProgress` 플래그로 복원 중 View 보호
- **Smart Scheduling 첫 실행 건너뛰기 방지**: `firstRun` 플래그로 플러그인 로드 후 첫 스캔 보장
- **Undo 후 이중 복원 방지**: History 복원 후 원본 엔트리의 `previousContent` 제거
- **스캔 시작 전 복원 중 체크 추가**: `execute()` 전 `isRestoreInProgress()` 확인 (Codex 교차 검증 P2)

releases.description:
## Release v0.4.1

### Changes since v0.4.0

#### Features
- **Inbox Progress Modal**: 실시간 프로그레스 바, 카운터, 현재 노트명, Cancel/ESC 취소, 완료 요약 (#75)
- **Max Response Tokens**: 4096 기본값 + Settings 슬라이더 추가
- **Quick Ask UX 개선**: 참조 출처 표시, 태그 라벨, 링크 자동 추가, 잘림 감지 (#69)

#### Bug Fixes
- **Inbox Watcher 피드백 루프**: 자체 이벤트 억제 (`isInboxProcessing` 가드)
- **Inbox Watcher 처리 미트리거**: `autoApplyInbox=true`일 때 실제 처리 실행
- **이동된 노트 에러**: `vault.exists()` 체크 후 `processed` 마킹
- **모달 이벤트 드레인**: 처리 중 큐잉된 이벤트 모달 종료 시 자동 처리
- **에러 타이틀 분리**: 처리 실패를 "취소됨"이 아닌 "실패"로 표시
- **do-while 무한 루프 방어**: `MAX_RERUN=3` 캡 추가
- **Auto Maintenance 첫 실행 보장** + Daily Note 깨진 링크 방지
- **BM25 검색 인덱스 초기화** + 태그 공백 sanitize (#68)

#### Refactor
- Organize Note에서 category 제거, folder 통합

### Codex 교차 검증
- 2차 검증, 총 5건 지적 중 유효 4건 모두 수정 반영
- 빌드 + 382 테스트 통과

## Fixes

### AI Hallucination 방지 + 노트별 고유 태그 추천

- 시스템 프롬프트에 "노트 내용만 기반으로 분석" 규칙 5개 추가

- summary에 태그/폴더 정보 혼합 금지
- 노트 무관 태그 선택 명시적 금지
